dyana.errors.config#

Functions

load_config(root)

Load DyANA config from repository root if present.

resolve_out_dir(config, cli_out_dir)

Resolve output directory from CLI arg or config.

Classes

ErrorHandlingConfig([mode, log_dir, run_id, ...])

Configuration for error-handling + logging behavior.

Exceptions

ConfigError

Raised when required runtime configuration is missing or invalid.
exception dyana.errors.config.ConfigError[source]#

Bases: ValueError

Raised when required runtime configuration is missing or invalid.

class dyana.errors.config.ErrorHandlingConfig(mode='run', log_dir=PosixPath('logs'), run_id='auto', console_level=20, file_level=10, write_jsonl=True, max_failures=None, treat_warnings_as_errors=False, env_prefix='')[source]#

Bases: object

Configuration for error-handling + logging behavior.

Parameters:

  • mode (Literal['debug', 'run']) – “debug” re-raises immediately on failure; “run” records failures and continues when it still makes sense (skipping dependent steps).

  • log_dir (pathlib.Path) – Directory where log files and JSONL event logs are written.

  • run_id (str) – Unique identifier for the run. If “auto”, a UUID4 is generated.

  • console_level (int) – Logging level for console output.

  • file_level (int) – Logging level for file output.

  • write_jsonl (bool) – If True, writes structured JSONL events to <log_dir>/events_<run_id>.jsonl.

  • max_failures (int | None) – If set, stops scheduling new work once the number of failed steps reaches this value. In “debug” mode this is ignored (you stop at first failure anyway).

  • treat_warnings_as_errors (bool) – Optional knob if you later want to elevate warnings to failures in a single place.

  • env_prefix (str) – If you want environment-variable overrides, set a prefix like "PALIMPS_" or "DYANA_".

  • example (Usage)

  • ------------- – cfg = ErrorHandlingConfig(mode=”run”, log_dir=Path(“logs”))

classmethod from_env(*, default=None)[source]#

Create config from environment variables.

Supported variables (prefix controlled by env_prefix on default): - <PFX>ERROR_MODE: “debug” | “run” - <PFX>LOG_DIR: path - <PFX>WRITE_JSONL: “1”/”0” - <PFX>MAX_FAILURES: integer

Notes

If default is None, uses cls() and prefix “”.

Parameters:

default (ErrorHandlingConfig | None)

Return type:

ErrorHandlingConfig

resolved_run_id()[source]#

Return a non-auto run id.

Return type:

str

console_level: int = 20#
env_prefix: str = ''#
file_level: int = 10#
log_dir: Path = PosixPath('logs')#
max_failures: int | None = None#
mode: Literal['debug', 'run'] = 'run'#
run_id: str = 'auto'#
treat_warnings_as_errors: bool = False#
write_jsonl: bool = True#
dyana.errors.config.load_config(root)[source]#

Load DyANA config from repository root if present.

Search order: 1) config.yaml 2) dyana.yaml

Parameters:

root (Path)

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

dyana.errors.config.resolve_out_dir(config, cli_out_dir)[source]#

Resolve output directory from CLI arg or config.

CLI value has highest priority. Fallbacks: - paths.out_dir - io.out_dir

Parameters:

  • config (dict[str, Any])

  • cli_out_dir (Path | None)

Return type:

Path
